## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Reproduction

```ts
// Minimal code to reproduce
import { loadImage } from 'vue-image-parser'

const decoded = await loadImage('...')
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or codes.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17.2)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **vue-image-parser version**: (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **Vue version**: (e.g., 3.4.0)
- **Image format**: (e.g., HEIC, AVIF, JPEG)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant details (screenshots, sample images, network logs).
